data.title: Quadro Resources Advances Staghorn Project and Issues New Stock Options
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Quadro Resources ( (TSE:QRO) ).

Quadro Resources Ltd. has announced that its earn-in partner, TRU Precious Metals Corp., has begun a diamond drilling program on the Staghorn claims, part of the Golden Rose Project in Central Newfoundland. This initiative aims to explore the potential of the gold-rich Cape Ray-Valentine Lake Shear Zone, a strategic area known for significant gold deposits. Additionally, Quadro has issued 2,175,000 new stock options to its directors, management, and consultants, which are exercisable at $0.07 per share and will expire in 2030. The progress in the Staghorn project and the issuance of stock options are expected to enhance Quadro’s operations and strengthen its position in the mineral exploration industry.

More about Quadro Resources

Quadro Resources Ltd. is a publicly traded mineral exploration company focused on advancing gold exploration projects across North America. It is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol ‘QRO’ and holds a 100% ownership interest in the Staghorn property, which is optioned to TRU Precious Metals Corp., as well as fully owning the Long Lake property.

Average Trading Volume: 107,381

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$855.3K

For an in-depth examination of QRO stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Lottery.com Announces Acquisition of Dotcom Ventures Stake
data.description:
Lottery.com ( (LTRY) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On May 7, 2025, Lottery.com Inc. announced its intention to acquire a majority ownership stake in Dotcom Ventures Inc. by purchasing at least 51% of its assets, including domain names concerts.com and ticketstub.com, for $5 million. This strategic move is subject to due diligence and regulatory approvals, and it is expected to enhance Lottery.com’s market positioning by expanding its digital asset portfolio, with the transaction anticipated to close by August 1, 2025.

More about Lottery.com

Lottery.com Inc. operates in the online lottery industry, providing platforms for purchasing lottery tickets and related services. The company focuses on leveraging technology to offer convenient access to lottery games and aims to expand its market presence through strategic acquisitions.

Average Trading Volume: 2,352,742

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $16.79M

data.title: Latin Metals Expands Leadership and Upsizes Financing Amid Strong Investor Interest
data.description:
An update from Latin Metals ( (TSE:LMS) ) is now available.

Latin Metals Inc. has appointed Eduardo Leon as Vice President of Exploration, recognizing his significant contributions since joining the company in 2020. Leon’s leadership and strategic thinking have been pivotal in identifying key exploration opportunities, particularly in Argentina, aligning with the company’s goal to enhance its project portfolio. Additionally, Latin Metals has increased its private placement to raise $1.3 million, driven by investor interest. The funds will support exploration activities and general working capital, with the financing subject to regulatory approvals.

More about Latin Metals

Latin Metals Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on exploration and development of mineral properties in South America. The company employs a prospect generator model to maximize exploration potential while minimizing shareholder dilution.

Average Trading Volume: 51,048

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$13.18M

data.title: Frequentis AG Announces Executive Board Share Transactions
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Frequentis AG ( (DE:FQT) ).

Frequentis AG has announced a series of share transactions involving Norbert Haslacher, a member of its Executive Board. The transactions, which took place on the Vienna Stock Exchange, involved the sale of shares at various prices, with an aggregated volume of 7,455 shares at an average price of 41.7425 EUR on May 5, 2025, and additional transactions on subsequent days. This announcement is part of the company’s regulatory compliance under article 19 MAR, which requires disclosure of transactions by persons discharging managerial responsibilities.

More about Frequentis AG

Frequentis AG is a company based in Vienna, Austria, that operates in the technology industry, focusing on communication and information solutions for safety-critical sectors such as air traffic management, public safety, and defense. The company is listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange and also trades on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 7,324

Current Market Cap: €562.4M

data.title: Tootsie Roll Elects New Board Members and Auditor
data.description:

At the Annual Meeting of Shareholders held on May 5, 2025, Tootsie Roll Industries, Inc. successfully elected five nominees to its Board of Directors and ratified the appointment of Grant Thornton LLP as its independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year 2025. These decisions reflect the company’s ongoing efforts to maintain strong governance and financial oversight, which are crucial for its operational stability and stakeholder confidence.

data.title: Bialetti Extends Deadline and Lowers Threshold for Auditor Board Submissions
data.description:
The latest update is out from Bialetti Industrie S.p.A. ( (IT:BIA) ).

Bialetti Industrie S.p.A. has announced an extension of the deadline and a reduction in the minimum participation percentage for submitting lists for appointing the Board of Statutory Auditors. This change allows minority shareholders to submit lists by May 12, 2025, with a lowered threshold of 1.25% of the company’s share capital, potentially impacting the company’s governance and shareholder engagement.

More about Bialetti Industrie S.p.A.

Bialetti Industrie S.p.A. is a prominent industrial company in Italy, recognized internationally for its Bialetti brand, which is synonymous with Italian taste and design. The company specializes in the production and marketing of houseware products, particularly focusing on coffee preparation items like traditional and electric coffee makers, as well as espresso machines. Bialetti is committed to excellence, integrating quality, safety, and technological innovation while considering social and environmental responsibilities.

Average Trading Volume: 382,990

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €70.34M

data.title: Banco de Sabadell Completes Share Buyback Program
data.description:
An update from Banco de Sabadell ( (ES:SAB) ) is now available.

Banco de Sabadell has completed its share buyback program, acquiring 99,460,820 shares, which represents approximately 1.846% of its share capital, for a total of 247 million euros. The buyback aims to reduce the company’s share capital by canceling the acquired shares, thereby increasing earnings per share and enhancing shareholder remuneration.

More about Banco de Sabadell

Banco de Sabadell is a financial institution operating in the banking sector, providing a range of banking and financial services. The company focuses on serving individual clients, businesses, and institutions, with a strong presence in the Spanish market.

data.title: Swedish Export Credit Corporation Issues $1.75 Billion in Medium-Term Notes
data.description:
The latest update is out from ELEMENTS Linked to the ICE BofAML Commodity Index eXtra Biofuels Total Return ( (FUE) ).

On May 8, 2025, Aktiebolaget Svensk Exportkredit (publ) announced the issuance of US$1.75 billion in Medium-Term Notes, Series H, with a 3.750% interest rate due in 2028. This strategic move is part of the company’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its financial position and support its operations in the export credit sector, potentially impacting stakeholders by enhancing the company’s funding capabilities.

More about ELEMENTS Linked to the ICE BofAML Commodity Index eXtra Biofuels Total Return

Aktiebolaget Svensk Exportkredit (publ), known as the Swedish Export Credit Corporation, operates in the financial services industry, focusing on providing credit and financial solutions to support Swedish exports. The company is involved in issuing medium-term notes as part of its financial offerings.

data.description:

TWC Enterprises Limited announced the voting results from its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, where all eight nominees for the Board of Directors were elected with overwhelming support. Additionally, Deloitte LLP was appointed as the auditor for the upcoming year. The high participation rate of 86.36% of issued and outstanding shares reflects strong shareholder engagement, which could positively impact the company’s governance and strategic direction.

TWC Enterprises Limited operates in the golf club industry under the trademark ‘ClubLink One Membership More Golf.’ It is Canada’s largest owner, operator, and manager of golf clubs, with 47 18-hole equivalent championship courses and 2.5 academy courses across 35 locations in Ontario, Quebec, and Florida.
